candidates.title: re_enable_automation
candidates.summary: Re-enable automation for the song.

candidates.title: set_time_signature
candidates.summary: Set the session time signature.

candidates.title: start_playback
candidates.summary: Start Ableton playback.
candidates.live_mapping: - Calls `song.start_playing()` when playback isn't already running.

candidates.title: set_loop_length
candidates.summary: Set the song loop length (in beats).

candidates.title: get_metronome_volume
candidates.summary: Get the metronome volume when available.
candidates.live_mapping: - Reads `song.metronome` when exposed as a volume value.

candidates.title: nudge_down
candidates.summary: Nudge playback position down.

candidates.title: set_loop_start
candidates.summary: Set the song loop start position (in beats).

candidates.title: set_punch_in
candidates.summary: Enable or disable punch-in recording.

candidates.title: stop_playback
candidates.summary: Stop Ableton playback.

candidates.title: set_arrangement_overdub
candidates.summary: Enable or disable arrangement overdub.

candidates.title: start_recording
candidates.summary: Start recording (sets `record_mode` and starts playback if needed).
candidates.live_mapping: - Sets `song.record_mode = True` and calls `song.start_playing()` if not playing.

candidates.title: jump_to_time
candidates.summary: Jump playback to a specific time (in beats).

candidates.title: set_session_automation_record
candidates.summary: Enable or disable session automation recording.

candidates.title: nudge_up
candidates.summary: Nudge playback position up.

candidates.title: set_session_record
candidates.summary: Enable or disable session record.

candidates.title: set_tempo
candidates.summary: Set the session tempo (BPM).

candidates.title: tap_tempo
candidates.summary: Tap tempo (one tap registers a tempo change in the host).

candidates.title: set_back_to_arranger
candidates.summary: Enable or disable "back to arranger" behavior.

candidates.title: ping
candidates.summary: Lightweight health ping; responds to verify the MCP server is reachable.
candidates.live_mapping: No Live API calls — returns a simple `ok` JSON payload for connectivity checks.

candidates.title: continue_playing
candidates.summary: Continue playback from current position.

candidates.title: get_session_info
candidates.summary: Return session-level state (playback, tempo, time signature, loop, counts, recording state, metronome, nudge).

candidates.title: set_punch_out
candidates.summary: Enable or disable punch-out recording.

candidates.title: get_session_record
candidates.summary: Get whether session record is enabled.

candidates.title: set_metronome
candidates.summary: Enable or disable the metronome.

candidates.title: undo
candidates.summary: Undo the last action in the host.

candidates.title: get_current_time
candidates.summary: Get current playback position and whether the host is playing.

candidates.title: stop_recording
candidates.summary: Stop recording (clears `record_mode`).

candidates.title: set_metronome_volume
candidates.summary: Set the metronome volume (0.0–1.0) when available.
candidates.live_mapping: - Writes `song.metronome = volume` when the host exposes metronome volume.

candidates.title: health_check
candidates.summary: Performs a lightweight diagnostic check of the MCP service and returns version/uptime info.
candidates.live_mapping: No Live API calls; returns diagnostic info such as server version and uptime. Useful for monitoring.

candidates.title: redo
candidates.summary: Redo the last undone action in the host.

candidates.title: get_session_automation_record
candidates.summary: Get whether session automation recording is enabled.

candidates.title: capture_midi
candidates.summary: Capture MIDI from the most recently played notes.
candidates.live_mapping: - Calls `song.capture_midi()`; behavior depends on host capabilities.
